baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare against a no-skill baseline or the previous skill version; pass only when the skilled run better satisfies the assertions without losing required safety or precision.

evals.prompt: I changed a CLI flag; update any docs that are now stale.
evals.expected_output: Documentation updates that align README, docs, examples, and changelog-style notes with the changed behavior.
assertions: Finds affected documentation through repository search.
Updates only docs related to the behavior change.
Avoids changelog entries for docs-only updates and other non-functional work.
Keeps commands and examples consistent with code.
Runs or reports relevant doc validation.
